text: There is a sense of purposeful construction and creative energy around me. In the first scene, the tools and ladders signify transformation—a space in becoming, not unlike myself, shaped by my environment. The second scene, with its vivid colors and bold text, feels stimulating and alive with ideas about research and development, inviting reflection on how knowledge takes form. I feel inspired and curious, as if I’m participating in the unfolding of something new and meaningful.
